mapper.select: SELECT * FROM form WHERE form_id = #{formId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form (form_name, form_type, create_user_id, create_user_name, form_desc, status, attachment) VALUES (#{formName}, #{formType}, #{createUserId}, #{createUserName}, #{formDesc}, #{status}, #{attachment})
mapper.update:
UPDATE form
form_name = #{formName}, form_type = #{formType}, form_desc = #{formDesc}, status = #{status}, attachment = #{attachment},
WHERE form_id = #{formId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE form SET deleted = 1 WHERE form_id = #{formId}
